content.problemStatement: Consider an undirected graph GGG with NNN vertices, numbered 111 through NNN. You are given an integer sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ describing the edges of this graph — for each pair of vertices uuu and vvv, there is an edge between those vertices if and only if AuA_uAu​ and AvA_vAv​ are coprime. Find the number of connected components of GGG.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer — the number of connected components.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
There are two edges (2,3)(2, 3)(2,3) and (3,5)(3, 5)(3,5). There are 333 connected components (1)(1)(1), (2,3,5)(2, 3, 5)(2,3,5) and (4)(4)(4).
